name: sui402
description: Sui-native machine payments for AI agents, APIs, and MCP tools.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @sui402/protocol && npm run build -w @sui402/policy && npm run build -w @sui402/receipts && npm run build -w @sui402/registry && npm run build -w @sui402/sui && npm run build -w @sui402/indexer && npm run build -w @sui402/server && npm run build -w @sui402/walrus && npm run build -w @sui402/client && npm run build -w @sui402/storage && npm run build -w @sui402/gateway && npm run build -w @sui402/mcp && npm run build -w @sui402/pay && npm run build -w @sui402/provider-api && npm run build -w @sui402/session-cli && npm run build -w @sui402/create-sui402 && npm run build -w @sui402/console-api && npm run build -w @sui402/dashboard
scripts.check: npm run check -w @sui402/protocol && npm run check -w @sui402/policy && npm run check -w @sui402/receipts && npm run check -w @sui402/registry && npm run check -w @sui402/sui && npm run check -w @sui402/indexer && npm run check -w @sui402/server && npm run check -w @sui402/walrus && npm run check -w @sui402/client && npm run check -w @sui402/storage && npm run check -w @sui402/gateway && npm run check -w @sui402/mcp && npm run check -w @sui402/pay && npm run check -w @sui402/provider-api && npm run check -w @sui402/session-cli && npm run check -w @sui402/create-sui402 && npm run check -w @sui402/console-api && npm run check -w @sui402/dashboard
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm test && npm run build && npm run security:check && npm run package:check && npm run package:clean-install
scripts.deploy:prod:certify: npm run launch:check && npm run deploy:prod:build && npm run deploy:prod:up && npm run deploy:prod:smoke
scripts.indexer:sync: npm run build -w @sui402/indexer && node packages/indexer/dist/sync.js sync
